zh.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex於1305年出生在英國英格蘭艾可。她於1325年與Richard Fitz Ralph結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex于1305年出生在英国英格兰艾可。她于1325年与Richard Fitz Ralph结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Essex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Essex, whose name is from Old English ēast ‘east’ + Seaxe ‘Saxons’. In England, the surname is now particularly common in Birmingham.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Audrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered form of the Old English girl's name Æðelþryð, derived from æðel ‘noble’ + þryð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 6th-century saint (normally known by the Latinized form of her name, Etheldreda), who was a particular favourite in the Middle Ages. According to tradition she died from a tumour of the neck, which she bore stoically as a divine punishment for her youthful delight in fine necklaces. The name went into a decline at the end of the Middle Ages, when it came to be considered vulgar, being associated with tawdry, that is, lace and other goods sold at fairs held in her name (the word deriving from a misdivision of Saint Audrey). Shakespeare bestowed it on Touchstone's comic sweetheart in As You Like It. In the 20th century, such associations largely forgotten, the name was revived, partly due in the 1950s and 60s to the popularity of the actress Audrey Hepburn ( 1929–93 ).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex was born in 1305, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Fitz Ralph in 1325. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex est née en 1305, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Fitz Ralph en 1325. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex wurde 1305 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1325 Richard Fitz Ralph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex è nata il nel 1305 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Fitz Ralph nel 1325. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Essex, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスエセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essexは1305年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた。1325年にRichard Fitz Ralphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex(은)는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1325년 Richard Fitz Ralph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex nasceu em 1305, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Richard Fitz Ralph em 1325. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex родилась в 1305 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fitz Ralph в 1325 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Audrey De Essex nació en 1305, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Richard Fitz Ralph en 1325. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
